supp_S4_scz_3dgenome.type: 3D-genome Hi-C loop table (NOT a CRISPR screen)
supp_S4_scz_3dgenome.interpretation: 68 of my variants are LD-proxy risk SNPs co-located in SCZ Hi-C loop anchors; co-membership, not CRISPR editing

prime_editing_cellgenomics.nearest: 6 of my variants within 50kb of SMARCB1 but all outside the 763bp edited window (closest ~1.8kb)
prime_editing_cellgenomics.interpretation: zero exact same-variant overlap; screen only covers 2 cancer genes, neither in my psychiatric set

har_neurons_nature.interpretation: 2 variants fall inside one HAR (region-level overlap, not variant-level CRISPR measurement)

single_variant_papers.TSNARE1_ADGRB1: named in text; rsID not provided

bottom_line: No exact same-variant, same-condition CRISPR measurement overlaps the 3,976. The only variant-level rsID overlap (68) is with a 3D-genome loop table, not a CRISPR screen. The two genuine CRISPR/base-editing screens cover unrelated genes (SMARCB1, MLH1) with zero coordinate overlap.
